name: LFSR Pseudo-Random Number Generator
description: Maximal-length Galois LFSR for pseudo-random bit and word generation. Supports widths 8, 16, and 32 with built-in optimal taps. Period = 2^WIDTH - 1.
author: aazhi-ip-lib contributors
usage_note: SEED must be non-zero (all-zeros is a lock-up state). For widths other than 8/16/32, provide custom taps via the taps function. Assert en each cycle to advance the sequence.
